data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Verify: ticket-revert.sh calls remove_marker() when target_event_type is ARCHIVED
- [ ] Verify: marker removal is best-effort (non-blocking on failure) 
- [ ] Verify: no-op for non-ARCHIVED event types
- [ ] Verify: python3 inline call uses correct sys.path from ticket_reducer.marker import
